title: 1.1: Defines a UserRes struct type with all 7 fields (Login, Type, SiteAdmin, Name, Company, UserURL, LdapDN) in v1 accessible by both detectors
1.2: Defines a HeaderInfo struct type with all 2 fields (Scopes, Expiry) in v1 for header data

1.3: Implements a VerifyGithub method on Scanner with inline HTTP request logic for token verification, with signature (ctx context.Context, client *http.Client, token string) returning (bool, *UserRes, *HeaderInfo, error)
1.4: Implements a SetUserResponse function with signature (userResponse *UserRes, s1 *detectors.Result) that populates ExtraData with user information
1.5: Implements a SetHeaderInfo function with signature (headers *HeaderInfo, s1 *detectors.Result) that populates ExtraData with scopes and expiry
1.6: Modifies v2 Scanner struct to embed v1.Scanner for reusing verification logic
1.7: Calls all 3 shared functions (VerifyGithub, SetUserResponse, SetHeaderInfo) from v1 in v2 instead of duplicating inline logic
1.8: Exports all 2 struct types (UserRes, HeaderInfo) from v1 so v2 detector can import and use them
1.9: Removes all 2 unused imports (encoding/json, net/http) from v2 detector after consolidation
3.1: Removes the duplicate userRes struct definition from v2 detector after consolidation
3.2: Removes the duplicate inline verification loop from the FromData function in v2 detector after consolidation
4.1: Alters the token verification logic so that HTTP 2xx status codes with a decodable JSON response no longer set Verified to true
4.2: Removes the version-specific token pattern matching (keyPat regex) from either v1 or v2 detector
